# Let's open the text file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-7Ufe147yrR1txHLzDQuq4d-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:3000]

import re, json, textwrap, unicodedata
text = open("/mnt/data/file-7Ufe147yrR1txHLzDQuq4d-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
# Find ranges inside quotes
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)))
len(spans), spans[:5]

queries: قُلْ آمِنُوا بِهِ أَوْ لَا تُؤْمِنُوا إِنَّ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِ إِذَا يُتْلَى عَلَيْهِمْ يَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ سُجَّدًا
إن لله أهلين من الناس هم أهل القرآن أهل الله وخاصته
تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ
إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَا إِلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ بِالْحَقِّ فَاعْبُدِ اللَّهَ مُخْلِصًا لَهُ الدِّينَ
الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُمْ بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ
إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى اللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ الْعُلَمَاءُ

output.code:
import os, json, sys, textwrap, glob, pathlib, itertools, re
files = os.listdir("/mnt/data")
files, [f for f in files if f.endswith(".json")]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-7Ufe147yrR1txHLzDQuq4d-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
import re
spans = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', text, flags=re.DOTALL)]
for i, s in enumerate(spans):
    print(i, s)

import json

def make_entry(start, end, text, ctype, aya_ref=None, hadeeth_ref=None):
    entry = {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": text,
        "citation_type": ctype,
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": aya_ref if aya_ref else {},
        "hadeeth_reference": hadeeth_ref if hadeeth_ref else {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }
    return entry

entries = []

# 0: 17:107
entries.append(make_entry(spans[0][0], spans[0][1], spans[0][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الإسراء","sura_number":17,"aya_number":107}))

# 1: hadith
entries.append(make_entry(spans[1][0], spans[1][1], spans[1][2], "Hadeeth", None, {}))
# 2: hadith
entries.append(make_entry(spans[2][0], spans[2][1], spans[2][2], "Hadeeth", None, {}))
# 3: hadith (Muslim maybe)
entries.append(make_entry(spans[3][0], spans[3][1], spans[3][2], "Hadeeth", None, {}))

# 4: 39:1
entries.append(make_entry(spans[4][0], spans[4][1], spans[4][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الزمر","sura_number":39,"aya_number":1}))
# 5: 39:2
entries.append(make_entry(spans[5][0], spans[5][1], spans[5][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الزمر","sura_number":39,"aya_number":2}))
# 6: 13:28
entries.append(make_entry(spans[6][0], spans[6][1], spans[6][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الرعد","sura_number":13,"aya_number":28}))
# 7: 3:190
entries.append(make_entry(spans[7][0], spans[7][1], spans[7][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"آل عمران","sura_number":3,"aya_number":190}))
# 8: 35:28
entries.append(make_entry(spans[8][0], spans[8][1], spans[8][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"فاطر","sura_number":35,"aya_number":28}))
# 9: 39:67
entries.append(make_entry(spans[9][0], spans[9][1], spans[9][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الزمر","sura_number":39,"aya_number":67}))
# 10: 6:103
entries.append(make_entry(spans[10][0], spans[10][1], spans[10][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الأنعام","sura_number":6,"aya_number":103}))
# 11: 39:39
entries.append(make_entry(spans[11][0], spans[11][1], spans[11][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"الزمر","sura_number":39,"aya_number":39}))
# 12: 32:30
entries.append(make_entry(spans[12][0], spans[12][1], spans[12][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"السجدة","sura_number":32,"aya_number":30}))
# 13: 53:29
entries.append(make_entry(spans[13][0], spans[13][1], spans[13][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"النجم","sura_number":53,"aya_number":29}))
# 14: 32:30 again
entries.append(make_entry(spans[14][0], spans[14][1], spans[14][2], "Aya",
                          {"sura_name":"السجدة","sura_number":32,"aya_number":30}))

result = {"citations": entries}
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:1000])

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
